mapper.select: SELECT id, form_id, input_fields, result_json, is_pinned, create_time FROM field_mapping_history ORDER BY is_pinned DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO field_mapping_history (form_id, input_fields, result_json, is_pinned, create_time) VALUES (#{formId}, #{inputFields}, #{resultJson}, #{isPinned}, #{createTime})
